element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Requires rhythmic button timing to maintain altitude
Player learns balloon vulnerability through first enemy contact
Early stages feature few enemies; count and aggression increases progressively
Teaches spatial awareness of lower screen boundary; piranha adds threat at water surface
Simple layouts early; complexity increases with stage progression
Score accumulation mechanic; separate from survival pressure
Alternates with Balloon Trip collection objective; high-speed threat
Difficulty scaling mechanism creating cumulative pressure

typical_relief_triggers: Entering bonus stage (reduced threat, score focus)
Transitioning to Balloon Trip mode (changes objective from survival to collection)
typical_tension_triggers: Proximity to water with piranha threat
Increasing enemy density as stages progress
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical tension built through enemy accumulation and platform navigation; relief punctuated by bonus stages and mode alternation between combat-survival (1P/2P) and avoidance-collection (Balloon Trip)

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Bonus stages appear every third stage, offering risk-free score accumulation

difficulty_curve.early_game: Few enemies, simple platform layouts; player learns flapping rhythm and enemy interaction patterns
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Enemy count and platform complexity increase; water and piranha hazards become more threatening
difficulty_curve.late_game: High enemy density; players must manage balloon damage while navigating complex platforms; Balloon Trip segments intensify with lightning frequency
notable_spikes: Transition from bonus stage back to regular stages (sudden enemy density return)
Late-stage enemy escalation creating cumulative pressure

notable_level_patterns.description: Clear all enemy Balloon Fighters from screen; enemies float and must be engaged aerially; defeated enemies drop bubbles for bonus points
Appears every three stages; balloons rise from chimneys at bottom; player collects them for points without enemy threat
Side-scrolling single-player segment; avoid lightning sparks and collect balloons for high score; one life system creates high tension
